name: Fantasy Choco Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE SUGAR, MILK AND MARGARINE in a heavy sauce pan and bring to a boil.
2. STIR CONSTANTLY until the mixture reaches a boil.
3. CONTINUE TO BOIL for 5 minutes over medium heat.
4. REMOVE FROM HEAT and stir in CHOCOLATE CHIPS.
5. ADD MARSHMALLOW CREAM AND VANILLA EXTRACT.
6. BEAT UNTIL WELL BLENDED.
7. POUR the mixture into a well-buttered 9 x 13-inch pan.
8. COOL AT ROOM TEMPERATURE until firm.
9. CUT INTO SQUARES.
